name: Fall Harvest Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine popcorn, shoestring potatoes and nuts in a large roasting pan.
3. Set aside.
4. In a small bowl, combine butter, dill weed, Worcestershire sauce, lemon pepper seasoning, garlic powder, and onion powder.
5. Pour the mixture over the popcorn mix, stirring until evenly coated.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes, stirring once.
7. Cool completely before storing in airtight containers.
